title: Blood pump housing device
abstract: A blood pump housing device designed to enclose and protect a total artificial heart when implanted in a subject is disclosed. The blood pump housing device comprises a first and second artificial heart pump receiving part (3a, 3b) configured to receive and partly enclose a first and a second artificial heart pump (20a, 20b) of a total artificial heart (TAH); and a first and second pump actuation enclosing part (4a, 4b) configured to partly enclose a first and second pump actuation means (60a, 60b), said artificial heart pump receiving parts (3a, 3b) and pump actuation means enclosing parts (4a, 4b) are arranged to connect to each other in a leak-free manner.
claims:
Claims 1 . A blood pump housing device (2) comprising a first and second artificial heart pump receiving part (3a, 3b) configured to receive and partly enclose a first and a second artificial heart pump (20a, 20b) of a total artificial heart (TAH); and a first and second pump actuation enclosing part (4a, 4b) configured to partly enclose a first and second pump actuation means (60a, 60b), said artificial heart pump receiving parts (3a, 3b) and pump actuation means enclosing parts (4a, 4b) are arranged to connect to each other in a leak-free manner. 2. The blood pump housing device (2) according to claim 1 , wherein the pump receiving parts (3a, 3b) are connected to the pump actuation means enclosing parts (4a, 4b) by connecting means (61 a, 61 b) selected from the group consisting of screws, ribbons, bolts and nuts and/or glue. 3. The blood pump housing device (2) according to claim 2, wherein each pump receiving part (3a, 3b) has an upper open end (6a, 6b) and a lower open end (7a, 7b), said upper open end (6a, 6b) is arranged with an upper cover (23a, 23b) provided with an inlet channel (24a, 24b), and said lower open end (7a, 7b) is arranged with a lower cover (26a, 26b) provided with an outlet channel (27a, 27b). 4. The blood pump housing device (2) according to claim 3, wherein the outlet channels (27a, 27b) are provided with one-way valves (29a, 29b). 5. The blood pump housing device (2) according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the pump receiving parts (3a, 3b) and the pump actuation enclosing parts (4a, 4b) are manufactured from a biocompatible material selected from the group consisting of titanium, ceramics, Polytetrafluoroethylene (PTFE) coated metal, diamond coated metal, silicone or polyurethane coated metals or a combination thereof. 6. The blood pump housing device (2) according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein each of said first and second heart pumps (20a, 20b) comprises a valve cylinder (22a, 22b) movably arranged inside said pump receiving part (3a, 3b), said valve cylinder (22a, 22b) is separated by a valve plane (31 a, 31 b) provided with a valve (32a, 32b), said valve plane (31 a, 31 b) dividing said valve cylinder (22a, 22b) into an artificial atrium (25a, 25b) and an artificial ventricle (28a, 28b). 7. The blood pump housing device (2) according to claim 6, wherein said artificial atriums (25a, 25b) and ventricles (28a, 28b) of said first and second artificial heart pumps (20, 21 ) are provided with a flexible lining material (37a, 37b), said flexible 

 lining material (37a, 37b) is connected to an upper cylinder junction (38a, 38b) arranged between said upper cover (23a, 23b) and a top edge of said upper open end (6a, 6b), and to a lower cylinder junction (39a, 39b) arranged between said lower cover (26a, 26b) and a bottom edge of the lower open end (7a, 7b). 8. The blood pump housing device (2) according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein said pump receiving parts (3a, 3b) comprise docking apertures (8a, 8b). 9. The blood pump housing device (2) according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein each of the first and second pump actuation enclosing parts (4a, 4b) comprises a pump actuation casing (65a, 65b), and wherein each first and second pump actuation casing (65a, 65b) is configured to receive and enclose a pump actuating means (60a, 60b) and dock to docking apertures (8a, 8b) on the pump receiving parts (3a, 3b). 10. The blood pump housing device (2) according to claim 9, wherein when said first and second pump actuation casings (65a, 65b) are docked to said docking apertures (8a, 8b) of said pump receiving parts (3a, 3b) said first and second pump actuating means (60a, 60b) are configured to apply movement to the valve cylinders (22a, 22b) in an upward and downward movement in response to control signals from a control unit. 1 1 . The blood pump housing device (2) according to any one of the preceding claims 9- 10, wherein said first and second pump actuation casings (65a, 65b) are docked to said docking apertures (8a, 8b) of the pump receiving parts (3a, 3b) by means of connecting means (61 a, 61 b) selected from the group consisting of glue, connecting screws, bolts and nuts, clamps and/or clips. 12. The blood pump housing device (2) according to claim 1 1 , wherein the connecting means (61 a, 61 b) are bolts and nuts. 13. The blood pump housing device (2) according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the pump actuating means (60a, 60b) comprises a plurality of interconnected gears (67a, 67b) configured to interact with a first and second linear toothed means (68a, 68b) provided on each side of the valve cylinder (22a, 22b), said gears (67a, 67b) translate a rotational movement provided by a pump actuation means to a linear up-an-down movement of the valve cylinder (22a, 22b). 14. The blood pump housing device (2) according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the pump actuating means (60a, 60b) comprises a ball screw / roller screw (62) interconnected with a semicircular base comprising two projecting arms (63a, 63b) which partly encircle and connect to said valve cylinders (22a, 22b), said ball screw / roller screw (62) is interconnected to a plurality of gears (71 , 72, 73) which 

 translates a rotational motion provided by a pump actuation means, into a linear up- and-down motion of the valve cylinders (22a, 22b). 15. The blood pump housing device (2) according to claim 14, wherein actuation magnets (64a, 64b) provided on said two projecting arms (63a, 63b) are connected to cylinder magnets (40a, 40b) provided on said valve cylinders (22a, 22b). 16. The blood pump housing device (2) according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the pump actuation enclosing part (4a, 4b) comprises a detachable power source housing (66a, 66b).
